div.head: The Minister in Haiti (White) to the Secretary of State
div.p: 107. The President and the Minister for Foreign AffairsCharles Fombrun became Minister for Foreign Affairs on May 15, 1941. have both expressed the desire that in order to accelerate the conclusion of the agreement regarding new fiscal arrangements the negotiations should be carried on here the more so as the date of departure of Dennis to the United StatesFernand Dennis, former Minister for Foreign Affairs, had been named Minister to the United States. may be delayed.
Please cable how soon the Department will be ready to continue negotiations and whether the above Haitian suggestion is agreeable.
